title: Creamy Spanish Tapas
description: A rich and flavorful tapas platter featuring a creamy gruyere sauce, perfectly paired with intensely flavorful ingredients.
instructions: In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add paprika and cook for 30 seconds.
Stir in cream and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let sauce simmer for 2-3 minutes or until slightly thickened.
Stir in grated Gruyere cheese until melted and smooth.
Arrange bread slices on a baking sheet and toast in the oven for 2-3 minutes or until lightly browned.
To assemble the tapas platter, place toasted bread on a serving platter, top with a spoonful of the creamy Gruyere sauce, and garnish with olives and artichoke hearts.
